---
name: Power Automate Flow Template
about: Describe this issue template's purpose here.
title: "[FLOW-XX] Short flow name"
labels: flow
assignees: dgornitsky

---

## Flow Name
<!-- Exact name as it will appear in the NITRO solution, e.g. NITRO — Write Audit Row -->

## Trigger
<!-- What starts the flow? e.g. Power Apps V2 trigger / Dataverse row updated / Schedule -->

## Description
<!-- What does the flow do step by step at a high level? -->

## Inputs
<!-- What data does the flow receive? -->

## Outputs / Write-Back
<!-- What does the flow write back to Dataverse, Teams, or Outlook? -->

## Connection References Required
<!-- List all connection references this flow depends on -->

## Environment Variables Required
<!-- List any environment variables consumed by this flow -->

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Flow runs successfully in Dev
- [ ] Flow runs successfully in Prod after managed solution import
- [ ] Connection references are mapped correctly during import
- [ ] Error handling scope (Try/Catch) is in place
- [ ] 

## Notes / Dependencies
<!-- Blocked-by items, licensing requirements, or IT provisioning needed -->
